data.name: Mega Hero
data.detailed_description:
盡量地破壞巨大女孩的衣物，以賺取更多獎勵。
在能量充足的情況下，按下[M]鍵。
將可以在時限內變身為巨型英雄，與巨大女孩抗衡。

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
技能 / 升級 / 撿寶
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
學習新的戰鬥技能，
或是升級強化身體能力，
還是在遊戲中拾取更好的武器，
都能讓你在戰鬥中擁有更好的優勢。

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
變身 / 擊敗 / 做愛
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
變身為巨型英雄擊敗巨大女孩後的H場景，
可以自由替換巨大女孩的服裝配件，
自由切換攝影機的視角來觀賞。
data.about_the_game:
盡量地破壞巨大女孩的衣物，以賺取更多獎勵。
在能量充足的情況下，按下[M]鍵。
將可以在時限內變身為巨型英雄，與巨大女孩抗衡。

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
技能 / 升級 / 撿寶
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
學習新的戰鬥技能，
或是升級強化身體能力，
還是在遊戲中拾取更好的武器，
都能讓你在戰鬥中擁有更好的優勢。

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
變身 / 擊敗 / 做愛
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
變身為巨型英雄擊敗巨大女孩後的H場景，

data.short_description: 與外星人所製造的巨大女孩戰鬥， 破壞她們的衣物，並發生肉體碰撞！ 第三人稱射擊&第三人稱格鬥的遊戲方式。 多種的武器&技能，互動H內容。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i7
  • 記憶體: 16 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Mega Hero
data.detailed_description:
Destroy as many of the giant girl's clothes as you can to earn more rewards.
Press the [M] key when you have enough energy.
You will be able to transform into a giant hero within the time limit and fight against the giant girl.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Skills / Upgrading / Treasure Hunting
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Learn new combat skills.
Or upgrading your body's abilities.
or picking up better weapons in the game.
All of which will give you a better edge in battle.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Transform / Defeat / Make Love
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
H-scene after transforming into a giant hero and defeating a giant girl.
You can freely change the clothes and accessories of the giant girl.
You can change the angle of the camera to view the scene.
data.about_the_game:
Destroy as many of the giant girl's clothes as you can to earn more rewards.
Press the [M] key when you have enough energy.
You will be able to transform into a giant hero within the time limit and fight against the giant girl.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Learn new combat skills.
Or upgrading your body's abilities.
or picking up better weapons in the game.
All of which will give you a better edge in battle.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Transform / Defeat / Make Love
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
H-scene after transforming into a giant hero and defeating a giant girl.
You can freely change the clothes and accessories of the giant girl.
You can change the angle of the camera to view the scene.
data.short_description: Battle giant girls created by aliens. Break their clothes and have physical collisions! Third-person shooting & third-person fighting gameplay. Multiple weapons & skills, interactive H content.
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 7
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i7
  • Memory: 16 MB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
